title: krunkit crash on macos 26.5.1
body:
### Issue Description

run `/opt/homebrew/bin/krunkit -v`
```
dyld[26302]: Library not loaded: /opt/homebrew/opt/libepoxy/lib/libepoxy.0.dylib
  Referenced from: <57EF7625-287B-31FA-89D3-5F3EAD00566C> /opt/homebrew/Cellar/libkrun-efi/1.16.0/lib/libkrun-efi.1.16.0.dylib
  Reason: tried: '/opt/homebrew/opt/libepoxy/lib/libepoxy.0.dylib' (no such file), '/System/Volumes/Preboot/Cryptexes/OS/opt/homebrew/opt/libepoxy/lib/libepoxy.0.dylib' (no such file), '/opt/homebrew/opt/libepoxy/lib/libepoxy.0.dylib' (no such file)
[1]    26302 abort      /opt/homebrew/bin/krunkit -v
```

### Steps to reproduce the issue

Steps to reproduce the issue
1. brew install podman
2. podman machine init
3. podman machine start
4. krunkit -v

### Describe the results you received

podman machine start
```
Starting machine "podman-machine-default"
Error: krunkit was terminated by signal: abort trap
```

krunkit -v
```
dyld[26302]: Library not loaded: /opt/homebrew/opt/libepoxy/lib/libepoxy.0.dylib
  Referenced from: <57EF7625-287B-31FA-89D3-5F3EAD00566C> /opt/homebrew/Cellar/libkrun-efi/1.16.0/lib/libkrun-efi.1.16.0.dylib
  Reason: tried: '/opt/homebrew/opt/libepoxy/lib/libepoxy.0.dylib' (no such file), '/System/Volumes/Preboot/Cryptexes/OS/opt/homebrew/opt/libepoxy/lib/libepoxy.0.dylib' (no such file), '/opt/homebrew/opt/libepoxy/lib/libepoxy.0.dylib' (no such file)
[1]    26302 abort      /opt/homebrew/bin/krunkit -v
```

### Describe the results you expected

no error

### podman info output

```yaml
OS: darwin/arm64
buildOrigin: brew
provider: libkrun
version: 5.8.3

Cannot connect to Podman. Please verify your connection to the Linux system using `podman system connection list`, or try `podman machine init` and `podman machine start` to manage a new Linux VM
Error: unable to connect to Podman socket: failed to connect: dial tcp 127.0.0.1:62533: connect: connection refused
```

### Podman in a container

No

### Privileged Or Rootless

None

### Upstream Latest Release

Yes

### Additional environment details

Additional environment details

### Additional information

Additional information like issue happens only occasionally or issue happens with a particular architecture or on a particular setting
